stemHtml: The pilot of an aircraft is executing a go-around in IMC. The pilot does NOT apply sufficient pitch up force and the aircraft is in an overspeed condition, travelling too fast. What is the sensory illusion that might be caused to the pilot due to the weight force?

options.b: False sensation of climbing due to acceleration. As a result the pilot reduces pitch and might fly into terrain.
options.c: False sensation of descending. As a result the pilot applies an abrupt pitch up that might cause the aircraft to stall.
options.d: False sensation of overspeed condition. As a result the pilot reduces thrust that might cause the aircraft to stall.
